channel.title: Frontion News Headlines
channel.description: Global geopolitical news curated by AI

item.title: 🇱🇧⚔️ Israel captures strategic Beaufort Castle in deepest Lebanon incursion in 26 years
item.description: Israeli forces seized the Crusader-era Beaufort Castle in southern Lebanon, marking a significant tactical advance as Defense Minister Israel Katz announced plans to expand the ground invasion. Lebanese Prime Minister Nawaf Salam accused Israel of pursuing a scorched-earth policy.

item.title: 🇺🇸🇮🇷 Trump tightens Iran deal terms, says no rush for agreement as war enters day 93
item.description: President Trump told Fox News he is in "no hurry" for a deal with Iran while US media reported he asked for amendments to toughen terms of the preliminary agreement. Iran accused the US of betraying diplomacy by continuing its naval blockade.

item.title: 🇷🇴🇷🇺 Russian drone hits residential building in Romania, NATO member on edge
item.description: A Russian Geran-2 (Shahed) drone struck an apartment building in the Romanian city of Galati near the Ukrainian border, injuring civilians and heightening concerns about spillover from the Ukraine war. Residents expressed fear about inadequate air defenses.

item.title: 🇺🇸🇬🇧🇦🇺 US, UK and Australia announce underwater drone project to protect undersea cables
item.description: Defense ministers from the three AUKUS partners unveiled a new underwater drone technology initiative at the Shangri-La Dialogue in Singapore. The project aims to protect critical undersea infrastructure, with the UK contributing £150m. The technology is expected to be ready by next year.

item.title: ✈️🇪🇺 Europe's sustainable jet fuel sector sees opportunity in Iran war disruption
item.description: The Iran war and Strait of Hormuz closure are boosting interest in e-SAF (electro-Sustainable Aviation Fuel) as Europe seeks energy independence. Germany's armed forces tested domestic e-SAF, and governments see strategic value in reducing reliance on Middle Eastern oil.

item.title: 🇬🇧🇨🇳 British Foreign Secretary to Visit China as UK Ties Show Signs of Thaw
item.description: Yvette Cooper will meet with Chinese counterpart Wang Yi and Vice-President Han Zheng to discuss the Strait of Hormuz, Russia-Ukraine war, and Ebola outbreak in Africa, signaling further easing of tensions following earlier summit.

item.title: 🇯🇵 Japan Rejects New Militarism Accusations at Shangri-La Dialogue
item.description: Defense Minister Shinjiro Koizumi defended Japans military buildup at the Singapore forum, calling it strange that Japan is labeled militaristic despite having no nuclear weapons or strategic bombers.

item.title: 🇨🇴 Colombia Votes in Presidential Election Amid Resurgent Violence
item.description: First-round voting underway in election seen as referendum on President Gustavo Petro, with candidates offering divergent visions 10 years after historic FARC peace deal. Campaign marred by drone strikes and armed attacks.

item.title: 🌀 Typhoon Jangmi to Bring Heavy Rain to Japan This Week
item.description: Japan Meteorological Agency warns of warning-level rainfall up to 300mm along Pacific coast through June 3. Airlines cancel flights to Okinawa as typhoon approaches southern islands.

item.title: 🇮🇷🇺🇸 Trump Seeks Amendments to US-Iran Deal on Enriched Uranium
item.description: Axios reports President Trump requested tougher terms on Irans enriched uranium in the draft peace agreement during Friday Situation Room meeting. Iran says no deal unless its rights are secured.

item.title: 🇨🇳 China Factory Activity Stalls in May as Demand Weakens
item.description: Chinas manufacturing PMI fell to 50.0 in May, missing forecasts and signaling economic headwinds as domestic and external demand soften amid ongoing trade tensions.

item.title: 🇺🇸🇪🇺 US Castigates Europe Over Defense Spending at NATO Meeting
item.description: Pete Hegseth criticized European NATO allies for insufficient defense spending while reassuring Asian partners at Shangri-La Dialogue of continued US commitment to Indo-Pacific security.

item.title: 🇮🇱🇱🇧 Israeli Troops Capture Beaufort Castle in Lebanon Push
item.description: Israeli military seized the historic Crusader fortress in deepest Lebanon incursion in decades, with Netanyahu calling it a dramatic shift in the campaign against Hezbollah.

item.title: 🇺🇦 Ukrainian Drones Strike Targets Across Multiple Russian Regions
item.description: Ukrainian drone attacks hit multiple Russian targets including a refinery in Saratov region, damaging civilian infrastructure as strikes intensify.

item.title: 🇨🇿 Czech Republic to Miss NATO Defense Spending Target
item.description: Prime Minister Petr Fiala told Financial Times that Czech Republic will likely fall short of NATO 2% spending goal this year, adding pressure on alliance burden-sharing debate.

item.title: 🇨🇳🇵🇭 China Patrols Scarborough Shoal After Philippines Warning
item.description: Chinese coast guard conducted patrols around disputed Scarborough Shoal in South China Sea days after Philippines issued warning about escalating tensions.

item.title: 🇰🇷🇯🇵 South Korea and Japan Discuss Military Logistics Support Deal
item.description: Seoul confirmed ongoing discussions with Tokyo on logistics cooperation agreement, signaling continued defense ties despite historical tensions.

item.title: 🇦🇺 US to Send Only Used Nuclear Submarines to Australia Under Amended AUKUS
item.description: Pentagon announced Australia will receive previously-owned Virginia-class submarines rather than new builds, a modification to the AUKUS pact amid budget and timeline concerns.

item.title: 🇺🇸 US Planning Faster Troop Withdrawal from Europe
item.description: Report indicates accelerated US military drawdown in Europe as Trump administration shifts focus to Asia and Middle East priorities.

item.title: 🇮🇳🇻🇳 India Signs BrahMos Missile Deal with Vietnam
item.description: Defense Secretary announced concluded agreement for BrahMos missile sales to Vietnam, with Indonesia deal in final stages, expanding Indias defense ties in Southeast Asia.

item.title: 🇺🇸✈️ Europe's Green Jet Fuels See Upside in Iran War
item.description: Interest in sustainable aviation fuel grows as Iran war and Hormuz closure push Europe to reassess energy dependencies, potentially reviving struggling e-SAF sector.

item.title: 🇲🇹 Malta Ballot Counting Starts After Snap Election
item.description: Prime Minister Robert Abela called snap election a year early, seeking fresh mandate to shield island from geopolitical crises. Opposition Nationalist Party candidate Alex Borg could become youngest PM.

item.title: 🇺🇸 Iran-US War Updates: Independent Reports on Latest Developments
item.description: US forces fired at ship attempting to breach Hormuz blockade while Israel intensifies operations in Lebanon. Senior Iranian commander warns any aggression will be met with forceful response.

item.title: 🇮🇷 ISW Iran Update: Military Operations Continue Despite Diplomatic Talks
item.description: Institute for the Study of War reports ongoing Israeli and US strikes on Iranian targets while diplomatic negotiations continue. NBC sources indicate Iran probably open to talks.
